tool_args.label: Recurring Agenda Items
tool_args.raw_text: Responsibility Performance Metrics Report Approval of Minutes Committee Chair & Members Committee Work Plan Committee Chair & Members President's Reports President Operations Report Senior Vice President Safety Report Chief Safety Officer MTA Police Report MTA Police Action Items (if any) Information Items Finance Reports Management & Budget Procurements Procurement & Logistics

payload.claim_text: Responsibility Performance Metrics Report Approval of Minutes Committee Chair & Members Committee Work Plan Committee Chair & Members President's Reports President Operations Report Senior Vice President Safety Report Chief Safety Officer MTA Police Report MTA Police Action Items (if any) Information Items Finance Reports Management & Budget Procurements Procurement & Logistics
payload.description: Recurring agenda items for the LIRR Committee meetings, including performance metrics, approval of minutes, committee work plan, president's reports, operations report, safety report, MTA Police report, action items, information items, finance reports, and procurements

tool_args.label: January 2025 - Winter Track Work Programs
tool_args.raw_text: January 2025 Winter Trackwork Programs Service Planning - The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.

tool_args.label: Procurement Procedure
tool_args.raw_text: Procurements - List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.description: Procedure for procurement items presented to the LIRR Committee
